    }

    }

}

#include <vector>

using namespace std;

long long lcp(const string& a, const string& b) {
    int len = min(a.size(), b.size());
    for (int i = 0; i < len; ++i) {
        if (a[i] != b[i]) return i;
    }
    return len;
}

vector<long long> solve(vector<string> words) {
    int n = words.size();
    if (n == 0) return {};
    if (n == 1) return {0};
    
    vector<int> prefix_lengths;
    for (int i = 0; i < n - 1; ++i) {
        prefix_lengths.push_back(lcp(words[i], words[i + 1]));
    }
    
    int m = prefix_lengths.size();
    if (m == 0) {
        // n == 1, but already handled
        return {};
    }
    
    vector<int> prefix_max(m, 0);
    prefix_max[0] = prefix_lengths[0];
    for (int i = 1; i < m; ++i) {
        prefix_max[i] = max(prefix_max[i - 1], prefix_lengths[i]);
    }
    
    vector<int> suffix_max(m, 0);
    suffix_max[m - 1] = prefix_lengths[m - 1];
    for (int i = m - 2; i >= 0; --i) {
        suffix_max[i] = max(prefix_lengths[i], suffix_max[i + 1]);
    }
    
    vector<long long> answer(n);
    
    for (int i = 0; i < n; ++i) {
        int modified_length = n - 1;
        if (modified_length < 2) {
            answer[i] = 0;
            continue;
        }
        
        long long max_original = 0;
        if (i == 0) {
            if (m >= 2) {
                max_original = suffix_max[1];
            }
        } else if (i == n - 1) {
            if (m >= 2) {
                max_original = prefix_max[m - 2];
            }
        } else {
            int left = i - 2;
            int right = i + 1;
            long long left_part = 0;
            long long right_part = 0;
            if (left >= 0) {
                left_part = prefix_max[left];
            }
            if (right < m) {
                right_part = suffix_max[right];
            }
            max_original = max(left_part, right_part);
        }
        
        long long new_lcp = 0;
        if (i > 0 && i < n - 1) {
            new_lcp = lcp(words[i - 1], words[i + 1]);
        }
        
        answer[i] = max(max_original, new_lcp);
    }
    
    return answer;
}
